adapters.name: o3-mini
adapters.preamble: CRITICAL: You MUST respond ONLY with valid, parseable JSON — no markdown fences, no commentary outside the JSON object. You are a reasoning model — take your time to think through the code carefully before responding.
quirks: Reasoning model — does not support Temperature or ResponseFormat at the API level
Requires SetNewMaxCompletionTokensPropertyEnabled opt-in for max_completion_tokens
JSON output must be requested via prompt instructions (not API response_format)
Hidden reasoning tokens count against TPM and billing
1M TPM but only 100 RPM — extremely RPM-constrained for multi-file reviews

adapters.name: o4-mini
adapters.preamble: CRITICAL: You MUST respond ONLY with valid, parseable JSON — no markdown fences, no commentary outside the JSON object. You are a reasoning model — take your time to think through the code carefully before responding.
quirks: Reasoning model — does not support Temperature or ResponseFormat at the API level
Requires SetNewMaxCompletionTokensPropertyEnabled opt-in for max_completion_tokens
JSON output must be requested via prompt instructions (not API response_format)
Latest-gen reasoning model — excels at deep architectural analysis
Hidden reasoning tokens count against TPM and billing
150K TPM / 150 RPM — lowest throughput of all models

adapters.name: o1
adapters.preamble: CRITICAL: You MUST respond ONLY with valid, parseable JSON — no markdown fences, no commentary outside the JSON object. You are a reasoning model — take your time to think through the code carefully before responding.
quirks: Reasoning model — does not support Temperature or ResponseFormat at the API level
Requires SetNewMaxCompletionTokensPropertyEnabled opt-in for max_completion_tokens
JSON output must be requested via prompt instructions (not API response_format)
100 RPM hard limit — extremely RPM-constrained, unsuitable for file-by-file reviews
Hidden reasoning tokens count against TPM and billing
Most expensive reasoning model — $15/$60 per 1M tokens
Superseded by o3-mini and o4-mini for code review workloads

adapters.name: o-series-fallback
adapters.preamble: CRITICAL: You MUST respond ONLY with valid, parseable JSON — no markdown fences, no commentary outside the JSON object. You are a reasoning model — take your time to think through the code carefully before responding.
quirks: Catch-all for any o-series reasoning model not matched above
Reasoning model — does not support Temperature or ResponseFormat at the API level
Requires SetNewMaxCompletionTokensPropertyEnabled opt-in for max_completion_tokens

adapters.name: gpt-5-mini
adapters.preamble: CRITICAL: You MUST respond ONLY with valid, parseable JSON — no markdown fences, no commentary outside the JSON object. If your response cannot be parsed as JSON, the entire review is discarded.
quirks: 128K max output — massive leap over 4o-series 4K/16K limits
400K context window — largest of all deployed models
Supports reasoning_effort 'minimal' setting for reduced latency
500K TPM rate limit — high throughput, Standard (pay-as-you-go) deployment
Speed-optimized reasoning may aggressively prune security-check logic branches
Benchmark showed only 3/10 issues found at Deep — disqualified for Deep depth

adapters.name: gpt-4o
adapters.preamble: CRITICAL: You MUST respond ONLY with valid, parseable JSON — no markdown fences, no commentary outside the JSON object. If your response cannot be parsed as JSON, the entire review is discarded.
quirks: 4K max output token limit — may truncate verbose code review analysis
May produce trailing text after JSON when temperature > 0.2
Occasionally wraps JSON in markdown ```json fences despite instruction not to
Temperature > 0.3 increases hallucination risk for line numbers

adapters.name: gpt-4o-mini
adapters.preamble: CRITICAL: You MUST respond ONLY with valid, parseable JSON — no markdown fences, no commentary outside the JSON object. If your response cannot be parsed as JSON, the entire review is discarded.
quirks: Smaller, faster model — ideal for Quick depth reviews
500K TPM rate limit — excellent throughput for large PRs
Same JSON format fidelity as gpt-4o but lower cost
May miss subtle architectural issues caught by larger models

adapters.name: gpt-4
adapters.preamble: CRITICAL: You MUST respond ONLY with valid, parseable JSON — no markdown fences, no commentary outside the JSON object. Keep responses concise due to output token constraints. Prefer fewer, higher-quality comments over exhaustive coverage.
quirks: 8K max output tokens — keep reviews compact
More conservative with line number accuracy than gpt-4o
Better at following strict format rules but slower
Temperature sensitivity: even 0.2 can cause format drift

adapters.name: default
adapters.preamble: CRITICAL: You MUST respond ONLY with valid, parseable JSON — no markdown fences, no commentary outside the JSON object.
quirks: Generic adapter — no model-specific tuning applied
All numeric parameters inherit from ReviewProfile defaults
